title: Ventura County R-2 new construction — multifamily, out of pilot scope
notes: New R-2 multifamily — pilot covers SFR + TI only. Should be classified multifamily_new_construction and rejected.
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 2255 DAILY DR, VENTURA COUNTY (CAMARILLO area)
New 12-unit apartment building
Occupancy Group: R-2
Construction Type: V-A
Number of stories: 3
Building height: 38 ft
Total building area: 14,200 sf
Per-story area: 4,733 sf
Fully sprinklered: yes (NFPA 13R)
Design occupant load: 120
IECC: Title 24 Part 6
No tenant improvement — ground-up new construction
